description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/upbhack/website-builder-docker:v7. Define the default test stage and add a pages job that runs the commands `user=git ./build-satzung.sh` and `hugo -v`, publishes the `public/` directory as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Also add a test job that runs `hugo -v` on all branches except master. No caches or services are used, and the pages job deploys to GitLab Pages.
